seo.homeTitle: Small-Batch Artisan Perfumes Handcrafted in Portugal
seo.aboutDescription: Meet Kim, the artisan behind KAS Fragrances. Handcrafted perfumes made in Portugal with premium European ingredients.

footer.brandDescription: Small-batch artisan perfumes handcrafted in Portugal. Each fragrance is personally blended by Kim using fine European ingredients.

home.heroTitle1: Hand-Blended Perfumes by Kim, Crafted One Bottle at a Time
home.heroSubtitle: Each fragrance is hand-blended by Kim using carefully selected European ingredients — never mass-produced, never rushed.
home.heroSocialProof: Loved by Kim's long-time clients, now available online
home.artisanQualityDesc: Handcrafted in small batches using premium European ingredients
home.collectionSubtitle: Discover unique scents, each one a personal expression of artistry and passion
home.discoveryTitle: Not Sure Which Scent Is Yours?
home.discoveryDesc: Try five of our signature fragrances for just €15 — and we'll include a €10 credit toward your first full bottle. The perfect way to discover your new signature scent.
home.discoveryDetails: 5 × 2ml spray vials · Free shipping · €10 credit included
home.kimStory1: Each KAS fragrance begins in Kim's studio, where every composition is blended by hand using carefully sourced European ingredients.
home.kimStory2: Working in small batches allows her to refine each scent slowly. Never rushed, never mass-produced.
home.kimQuote: "Perfume should feel personal. My hope is that every fragrance brings joy and becomes part of someone's story."

collection.title: The Collection
collection.subtitle: Each fragrance is handcrafted in small batches using the finest European ingredients. Discover your new signature scent.

product.testStep3: Compare how each evolves on your skin

cookies.message: We use essential cookies to make this shop work properly.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.name: Name
privacy.collectText: When you place an order, we collect the following information:
privacy.collectItem1: Name and contact details (email, phone, address)
privacy.collectItem2: Order and payment information (processed securely by Shopify)
privacy.collectItem3: Communication history if you contact us
privacy.useText: We use your information only to:
privacy.useItem3: Respond to your questions and requests
privacy.thirdPartyText: We use Shopify to process payments and manage orders. Shopify handles your payment data securely and is GDPR compliant. We do not sell or share your personal data with any other third parties.
privacy.rightsText: Under GDPR, you have the right to:
privacy.rightsItem1: Access the personal data we hold about you
privacy.rightsItem2: Request correction of any inaccurate data
privacy.rightsItem4: Object to processing of your data
privacy.rightsContact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at fragrancesbykas@gmail.com.
privacy.cookiesText: We use only essential cookies required for the shop to function (shopping cart, checkout). We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
privacy.contactText: For any privacy-related questions, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.introText: Welcome to KAS Fragrances. By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement.
terms.name: Name
terms.ordersText: When you place an order through our website:
terms.ordersItem1: All prices are displayed in Euros (EUR) and include applicable VAT
terms.ordersItem2: Payment is processed securely through Shopify Payments
terms.ordersItem3: Orders are confirmed via email once payment is successful
terms.ordersItem4: We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders at our discretion
terms.shippingText: We ship from Portugal to Portugal and EU countries:
terms.shippingItem1: Portugal: Free shipping on orders over €150. Shipping calculated at checkout based on weight for orders under €150
terms.shippingItem2: EU Countries: Shipping calculated at checkout based on weight
terms.shippingItem3: Delivery times: Portugal 3-7 business days, EU 7-10 business days
terms.returnsText: We want you to be happy with your purchase:
terms.returnsItem1: Unopened products may be returned within 14 days of delivery
terms.returnsItem2: Products must be in original condition and packaging
terms.returnsItem3: Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer
terms.returnsItem4: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days of receiving the return
terms.returnsContact: To initiate a return, please contact us at fragrancesbykas@gmail.com.
terms.intellectualText: All content on this website, including images, text, logos, and product descriptions, is the property of KAS Fragrances and is protected by copyright laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or use any content without our written permission.
terms.liabilityText: KAS Fragrances shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products or website. Our liability is limited to the value of the products purchased.
terms.governingText: These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of Portugal. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Portuguese courts.
terms.changesText: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
terms.contactText: For any questions about these terms, please contact us at:
